nasb.text: Anyone belonging to Jeroboam who dies in the city the dogs will eat. And he who dies in the field the birds of the heavens will eat; for the Lord has spoken it.” ’

esv.text: Anyone belonging to Jeroboam who dies in the city the dogs shall eat, and anyone who dies in the open country the birds of the heavens shall eat, for the Lord has spoken it.”’

cnv.text: 屬於耶羅波安的人，死在城裡的，必被狗吃掉；死在田野的，必給空中的飛鳥吃掉。因為這是耶和華說的。’

ccb.text: 耶罗波安家人中，死在城中的必被狗吃，死在田野的必被鸟吃。这是耶和华说的。’
